remove.menubar: Remove 'Programming language' in 'View' and its function. Remove 'Load Code File' in 'File' and its function.
remove.functions: Remove the functions about changing programming language.

change-add.file_select: 'Import Package' button, 'Import project' choice in the menu Instead of using askopenfile, pop up a windows, which contain: a listbox of json files in the 'packages' or 'projects' folders where user can select them to load, enable munti-select for 'Import Package', a button to load the selected files, a button which user can select json files outside and copy it to the correspond folder.
change-add.file_save: 'Save project' choice, new 'Save project as' coice Change current 'Save project' choice's name into 'Save project as'. Edit the original 'Save project' function as: it will save current project directly into the 'projects' folder without asksavefile, no asking for name, used the project name set by 'Rename Project...' choice, except when there is a file with same name in the folder, which will call 'Save project as'.
change-add.code_pack: The 'code_pack' block and related functions Add 'Save as pack' choice to top menubar: convert current content to python code, save to 'codepacks' folder directly, asking for name if there are file with same name there, else, used the project name set by 'Rename Project...' choice. Add 'Use pack' choice to top menubar: pop up a listbox to select files in both .py and .txt, place a 'Code Pack' block on the canva, selected file will be its content.
change-add.insert_code:
New function to change original 'Continue Line' from add content to replace Reduce the height of content edit area a bit, users can now add an 'insert target' below the content editor, and connect other block with 'Insert line' (replace original 'Continue Line'), when converting to code, the 'insert target' in the block connected to will be replaced by the content of blocks start the line, for 'control', 'loop', 'defining' block type, they can't start 'Insert line' and set 'insert target' but can be connected to from other blocks, all other types of blocks can start or be connected to, a block can be connected to more than one 'Insert line', when there is a block start and be connected to a 'Insert line' at the same time, replace the 'insert target' by the content of blocks start the lines,
block1: content: "Enter your name: " insert target: $prompt connect Insert: block2 block2: content: input($prompt) insert target: |ins_place| connect Insert: block5 block3: content: "Hello" insert target: a connect Insert: block5 block4: content: print(a, |ins_place|) code converted: print("Hello", input("Enter your name: "))
just change the function, keep shortcut key (ctrl+w) the same.

content.others: Change the height of codeblocks from 3 grid to 1 grid. Change app name to AntimonyIDE, project file from .onsp to .aide, and replace other text will shown from OurNotepad to AntimonyIDE. Allow the blocks to extend its width with longer limit than now when content was longer. Auto load 'Python' packages when started.
